info.name: Synology LDAP Manager
info.summary: Synology AD group sync and SMB storage by ACL — companion app for user_ldap
info.description:
Companion app for user_ldap: adds Synology-specific features on top of user_ldap's proven authentication.
**Requires user_ldap** configured to point at your Synology Active Directory.
**Features v3.0:** - Automatic AD group → Nextcloud group sync on each login (via user_ldap) - Automatic Nextcloud admin promotion via configurable AD group - Three SMB mount modes: manual, auto by group name, auto by Synology ACL - ACL mode: reads actual permissions via Synology DSM API — each user sees exactly the folders allowed by their AD groups - Identical Windows / Nextcloud folder structure via Mount Prefix field (/NAS/Accounting, etc.) - Visual admin interface with real-time ACL preview and SMB configuration
info.author: wdebonne
